text:
V. Composites: 2007 to 2025 89

The following tables contain composite crosswalk information for 2007 to 2025. The tables include composite names, items
that contribute to the composite, and question numbers across all years and survey types. The following key describes these
indicators.

D: DROPPED

—–: QUESTION NOT ASKED ON THIS SURVEY TYPE

X: ITEM NOT PART OF COMPOSITE

C: COMBINED ITEMS VARIABLE

ˆ: COMBINED ITEMS
